name: Learning-FastAPI
description: A hands-on FastAPI learning repository documenting my end-to-end journey through FastAPI. This repo focuses on practical coding, workflows, APIs, features, and real implementations rather than theory. Each tutorial/branch records concepts I learn, build, and experiment with as I progress.

name: DepthVision
description: FastAPI service combining monocular depth estimation with YOLOv8 object detection to compute real-world object distances and flag high-risk object pairs in a scene, with annotated visual output. Currently extending the risk-scoring model to handle occluded objects.

name: housing-price-prediction
description: Regression pipeline comparing Ridge, Lasso, and ensemble models for housing price prediction, deployed with an RMSE-optimized Ridge model. Includes a TF-IDF based chatbot for automated Q&A over a custom real-estate corpus.

name: ai-intent-calling-assistant
description: Streamlit application for real-time intent recognition from user voice/text commands using TF-IDF features and a LinearSVC classifier. Paused while exploring a transformer-based intent classifier as a v2.
